title: Hide Names
description: 🏷️ HideTag is a lightweight plugin that lets players hide or show their own nametag, while admins can instantly toggle nametags for the entire server.
body:
![HideTag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4b06ce661590a9e7a46b6bcbff566ca3ced079.png)

**HideTag** gives your server a simple way to control player nametags: players can hide or show their own name, and staff can run hide-all or show-all for everyone who is online at that moment. Those staff commands are not a lock — after a bulk, anyone can still use `/hidename` or `/showname` as they like. ![Before and after image of hidden playernames!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff8bbed9de387c625c5a43e862522e720578e34a.png) ## 🚀 Features - ⚡ Lightweight & fast - 🧩 No config needed - 👤 Personal nametag toggle for all players - 🛡️ Bulk hide/show for staff (all online players; not a permanent lock) - ✅ One jar, Java 8 bytecode — runs on Bukkit / Spigot / Paper / Purpur / Folia --- ## 💬 Commands - `/hidetag help` → Show command help - `/hidename` → Hide your own nametag - `/showname` → Show your own nametag - `/hideallnames` *(OP / permission)* → Hide every online player’s nametag (bulk) - `/showallnames` *(OP / permission)* → Show every online player’s nametag (bulk) --- ## 🔐 Permissions - `hidetag.help` *(default: true)* - `hidename.use` *(default: true)* - `showname.use` *(default: true)* - `hideallnames.use` *(default: op)* - `showallnames.use` *(default: op)* --- ## 📊 Metrics & privacy ![bStats chart](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/HideName.svg) --- ## 🛠️ Compatibility - Minecraft: Java Edition, 1.8 - 26.1.2 - Platforms: Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Folia - Java: 8+ --- ### 💙 Perfect for: Survival • SMP • Events • Roleplay • Streamer-friendly servers
